troubleshoot.description:
Home Assistant could not communicate with the LG TV over the serial port.

The most common cause is that **RS-232C Control** is not enabled on the TV. On most LG models this setting is in a hidden service menu (often called **InStart**); the exact location varies by model, so check your TV's documentation.

Also make sure that:
- The TV is powered on.
- The serial cable is a null-modem (cross-over) cable and is fully seated. LG's RS-232 jack is recessed, so push the plug in until it clicks.
- The correct serial port was selected.

Select **Submit** to try again.
troubleshoot.title: Connection failed

data_description.device: Serial port path to connect to. The TV must be powered on for the initial connection.
data_description.set_id: The set ID configured on the TV. Leave this at 1 unless you have multiple TVs daisy-chained on the same RS-232 bus.

command_failed.message: Failed to send the command to the TV: {error}
